title: Wine Cork Collector, Bottle Stoppers, Cap Collection Box and Corks. Made of Real Wood and Glass. (Long)
features: GREAT DESIGN: The rectangular wooden box with display window is the perfect collection and decoration box and the ideal showcase for wine corks.
COLLECTION BOX: The wine cork catcher from the modern look (shadow box) has a compartment in which the caps of the bottles are stored in a visually appealing way!
Hanging decoration: The bottle cap collection box can be optimally attached as a wall decoration in the kitchen, living room or dining room thanks to two locks.

SUPER GIFT: The hanging lid collector can be wonderfully gifted to couples who like to drink beer and wine, friends or loved ones! Give the gift of moments. Each cork tells a happy or sad story that makes us who we are.
Delivery volume: 1 x collection box // Dimensions: approx. 45 x 15 x 8 cm (H x W x D). Material: wood, glass, metal. Colour: wood, transparent. Give the gift of something beautiful.
description: Product Description CASTELL DECO Presents a novel cork collection box elegant and original. Smart and versatile design, these storage boxes The modern style of the collection box can be mounted on the wall or on a shelf. offer you a great ornament for your home. Great for gifts for men or women, wine lovers, for friends' birthday, colleagues, dad, boyfriend, husband, Christmas, Father's Day, Valentine's Day and anniversaries. Each cork or lid represents a special moment lived. Wine Cork Collector The wine cork lid collector box is constructed of a high-quality real thick wood base plate. Not chipboard, not easy to deform or break, durable. The modern style of the collection box can be mounted on the wall or on a shelf. Give you a great ornament for your place or as a gift. GREAT DESIGN: The rectangular wooden box with display window is the perfect collection and decoration box and the ideal showcase for wine corks.COLLECTION BOX: The wine cork catcher (shadow box) modern look has a compartment in which the bottle caps are stored in a visually appealing way! LARGE CAPACITY: Convenient compartment and an elegant opening for storage and collection HANGING DECORATION: The cork collection box can be optimally attached as a wall decoration in the kitchen or dining room easily and safely. SUPER GIFT: Hanging lid catcher can be wonderfully gifted to couples who like to drink beer and wine, friends or loved ones! Give the gift of moments. Every cork tells a story! !
